title: CraftsOfEgypt Genie Blown Empty Glass Mini Bottles for Perfume, Essential Oils or Potion - Set of 10 Decorative Small Vials, Each 2" High (5cm), Assorted Colors
description:
About this item
Perfect Size for Perfumes and Essential Oils: Volume from 5 to 15 ml. Height ranges from 1.5 -2.4 inch ( 4cm-6cm), each decorative refillable bottle holds the ideal amount of fragrance. Use the matching handcrafted stopper as an elegant applicator.
No Unpleasant Surprises: Every handcrafted tiny vial is unique. But we take care to ensure that your complete antique set closely resembles our product pictures - same fanciful shapes and rich, luminous colors.
Handmade in Egypt: Forget mass-produced imitations. Our gorgeous vintage colored glass bottles are mouth-blown, one by one, by skilled Egyptian craftsmen - for heirloom quality at an affordable price.
Securely Packaged for Safety: No worries. These elegant and cute magic vials are carefully packed and wrapped, so all will arrive safe and sound. If they don't, we'll provide free replacements.
› See more product details
reviews_5s: These are beautiful, crafted with care, the colors are lovely, the stoppers fit well. Additionally they were very carefully and well packed for security and arrived completely undamaged, even the smallest and most fragile. Thank you for providing a lovely product.Absolutely love each one. So unique!I’ve been looking for some cute small bottles to hold my medicine and these are just darling!!! My nightstand now looks extra glam. Big trade up from the incredibly obvious prescription bottles. Comes in a big set of various sizes - some super tiny. I’ll be using those as decoration throughout the house. I’ll feel like an old apothecary!Gorgeous little bottles. Using them for decoration.I bought these on a whim not knowing their size, quality etc. They’re VERY tiny, but what they lack in size they make up for with quality. And don’t even get me started on the little glass stoppers!! SO cute! Right now they’re just taking up space on the top shelf of my cabinet. Not sure what I’ll do with them tbh. Maybe I’ll use them for a craft in the future.I loved the beauty and the assorted sizes of these beautiful little bottles. I ordered 2 mixed sets of 20 and every single one arrived in perfect condition, thanks to the excellent packaging. They are to contain some earth from various locations in the Qodesh land of Yisrael brought back to me by a very special friend. I also purchased tiny little labels with cords to hang around the neck of each bottle for identification of the earth in each of them. I'm thinking a little bit of putty might work to hold in the lids just in case they should tip over... but we'll see. These bottles are well worth every penny and will make beautiful gifts for my family while we wait for YHWH to bring us back into His beloved land.Great value for the price…bottles are all beautiful.Están muy bonitos pero vinieron algunos rotos y la tapa queda suelta que si le hecho el aceite se derramaI had worried the glass would be painted but it is real colored glass. Small, medium, and small bottles that look so pretty on a dresser or in a display cabinet. The bottles are sturdy enough and the stoppers seal well enough to actually store liquid scents. A good buy for special gifts.I love these cool little bottles, I have them on display with my other favorite glass items!
reviews_1s: I received 9 bottles in usable condition. A couple of them were not as pictured though, the lid on them did not sit flush to the bottle like shown. It's unfortunate because it was one of the larger bottles too, which are the more usable bottles.I ordered 3 different sets of bottles from the NileCart. This particular set I ordered a set of 20, received only 18- the missing ones being the good ones. The second set of 12 perfume bottles I ordered was thankfully whole. However, only one had a decorative top and they were nothing like as pictured. I have a set of 6 coming and I have a feeling that I will get duplicates of the set I already have that also are very basic compared to the pictures. Expect NileCart sets in bulk to be short, much more basic and less vibrant than pictured, and any painting detail will be a total mess. I was super disappointed in all of their products I received and expect tomorrow's to be just as bad. There was literally only 1/12 that had a decorative top.Beautiful bottles but none of the tops stay on. Only can use the for decoration, and I really wanted to use them for my personal oils, rose water and Florida water. I might just buy cork tops on my own and use it like thatDescribed as 2 inches...NOT! These are no where near the 2 inches, super tiny. Won't hold fluids or perfumes. So sad cause they looked adorable. Also, didn't even get the full set in the box. Returned.Much smaller than the photos. Lids don’t stay on, very unhappy with this miniature purchase.Do not seal with top.They are beautiful, but very fragile, 2 were broken when they arrived.Read the description these are absolutely uselessTo smallNot secure the liquid
